title: Break some combinational cycles in DFG
body:
Added an algorithm that can break some combinational cycles in DFG, by attempting to trace driver logic until we escape the cycle. This can eliminate a decent portion of UNOPTFLAT warnings. E.g. due to this code:

```systemverilog
assign a[0] = .....;
assign a[1] = ~a[0];
```

The number of reported UNOPTFLAT warnings in select RTLMeter configurations:

| case | before | after |
|------|--------|-------|
|   NVDLA:default        | 25   | 1 |
|   OpenPiton:1x1        | 32   | 29 |
|   OpenPiton:2x2        | 32   | 29 |
|   OpenTitan:default    | 124  | 134 |
|   VeeR-EH1:default     | 2    | 0 |
|   VeeR-EH2:default     | 12   | 5 |
|   VeeR-EL2:default     | 10   | 3 |
|   Vortex:mini          | 7    | 5 |
|   Vortex:sane          | 7    | 5 |
|   XuanTie-C906:default | 8    | 3 |
|   XuanTie-C910:default | 12   | 3 |
|   XuanTie-E902:default | 4    | 3 |
|   XuanTie-E906:default | 1    | 0 |

For OpenTitan, the number of unique warnings have increased due to how the reporting works in the presence of highly connected components. The actual number of cyclic vertices during scheduling have reduced in OpenTitan by about 7%.

Performance:

```
execute - Sim speed [kHz] - higher is better
╒════════════════════════════════╤════╤════╤══════════════════╤══════════════════╤════════════╤═════════╕
│ Case                           │ #A │ #B │           Mean A │           Mean B │ Gain (B/A) │ p-value │
╞════════════════════════════════╪════╪════╪══════════════════╪══════════════════╪════════════╪═════════╡
│ NVDLA:default:gnet             │ 15 │ 15 │   0.77 (± 0.37%) │   0.78 (± 0.47%) │      1.01x │    0.00 │
│ OpenPiton:1x1:dhry             │ 15 │ 15 │  27.52 (± 0.32%) │  28.42 (± 0.43%) │      1.03x │    0.00 │
│ OpenPiton:2x2:fib              │ 15 │ 15 │   7.79 (± 0.26%) │   7.86 (± 0.64%) │      1.01x │    0.02 │
│ OpenTitan:default:sha          │ 15 │ 15 │   5.20 (± 0.61%) │   5.21 (± 0.48%) │      1.00x │    0.73 │
│ VeeR-EH1:default:cmark         │ 15 │ 15 │ 175.97 (± 0.54%) │ 177.88 (± 0.56%) │      1.01x │    0.01 │
│ VeeR-EH2:default:cmark_iccm_mt │ 15 │ 15 │  30.75 (± 0.49%) │  43.59 (± 0.47%) │      1.42x │    0.00 │
│ VeeR-EL2:default:dhry          │ 15 │ 15 │  98.06 (± 0.54%) │ 106.30 (± 0.59%) │      1.08x │    0.00 │
│ Vortex:mini:sgemm              │ 15 │ 15 │  92.34 (± 0.61%) │ 116.20 (± 0.62%) │      1.26x │    0.00 │
│ Vortex:sane:saxpy              │ 15 │ 15 │   4.32 (± 0.57%) │   4.86 (± 0.48%) │      1.13x │    0.00 │
│ XuanTie-C906:default:cmark     │ 15 │ 15 │  53.09 (± 0.52%) │  55.87 (± 0.55%) │      1.05x │    0.00 │
│ XuanTie-C910:default:memcpy    │ 15 │ 15 │   2.95 (± 0.65%) │   2.99 (± 0.53%) │      1.01x │    0.00 │
│ XuanTie-E902:default:memcpy    │ 15 │ 15 │  40.73 (± 0.44%) │  39.89 (± 0.54%) │      0.98x │    0.00 │
│ XuanTie-E906:default:cmark     │ 15 │ 15 │  27.45 (± 0.29%) │  27.81 (± 0.74%) │      1.01x │    0.00 │
╞════════════════════════════════╪════╪════╪══════════════════╪══════════════════╪════════════╪═════════╡
│ Geometric mean                 │    │    │                  │                  │      1.07x │         │
│ Geometric mean - pVal < 0.05   │    │    │                  │                  │      1.08x │         │
╘════════════════════════════════╧════╧════╧══════════════════╧══════════════════╧════════════╧═════════╛
```
